_comment: Manually curated ground-truth venue overrides. These ALWAYS win over OpenAlex/Semantic Scholar tagging, since conference program pages are more authoritative than automated indexing (which often never catches up for ML conferences that don't publish traditional proceedings). Add more papers here anytime by pasting a program list to Claude.
